additional_provisions.text: Seller shall, at seller expense, have the two gazebo structures on the back patio uninstalled and removed from the property; bolt holes in concrete patched with concrete filler.

Seller shall, at seller expense, hire licensed/qualified roofing contractor to replace existing roof with new minimum 30-year composite shingle roof; buyer selects/approves manufacturer, type, and color; documentation, warranty, and receipts provided to buyer agent.
Buyers may upgrade to Class 4 Impact Resistant Shingle; buyers responsible for upgrade charge.
If Inspection Resolution is sent to Buyer agent after 12:00 PM MT on Inspection Resolution Deadline, deadline automatically extends to next business day regardless of §3.3.3 selection.

seller_side.brokerage_firm_name: NRT Colorado, LLC, d/b/a, Coldwell Banker Realty

raw_blue_variable_spans.text: LOT 3 WAGON TRAILS SUB FIL NO 21 PLAT 10743
4902 Cherry Springs Drive, Colorado Springs, CO 80923
Cook Top/Range Oven, Dishwasher, Microwave Oven, Kitchen Refrigerator.
New ILC or Survey will only be ordered if required by lender or title company.
Copies of any and all reports and permits in the possession of the seller, sellers
representatives or sellers agent shall be provided to the buyer.
Examples may include, but are not limited to improvement location certificate, improvement
survey plat or boundary survey, property inspection reports, soil reports, drainage reports,
geological reports, certificate of occupancy, building permits, roof replacement/inspection
reports, structural reports, foundation repair documentation and/or any other inspections or
All original documents shall remain in the sellers possession until the time and date of
closing and will then be transferred to the buyer.
Seller shall promptly disclose any changes in the condition of the Real Property, Inclusions
and items listed above of which Seller has actual knowledge, as they occur.
30.1. Seller shall, at sellers expense, have the two gazebo structures on the back patio
uninstalled and removed from the property. Any holes in concrete from bolts used to fasten
gazebos down, shall be patched with concrete filler.
30.2. Seller shall, at sellers expense hire a licensed/qualified roofing contractor to replace
existing roof with a new minimum 30-year composite shingle roof. The manufacturer, type
and color of replacement roof shingles to be selected and approved by the buyer. All
documentation, warranty information and receipts shall be provided to the buyers agent
30.3. Buyers have the option to upgrade to a Class 4 Impact resistant shingle. If Buyers
decide to upgrade to a Class 4 Impact Resistant Shingle, Buyers will be responsible for the
30.4. In the case that the Inspection Resolution is sent to the Buyers agent after 12:00 PM MT
on the Inspection Resolution Deadline, the Inspection Resolution Deadline shall be
automatically extended to the next business day, regardless of what box is checked in
NRT Colorado, LLC, d/b/a, Coldwell Banker Realty

relationship_model.ContractDocument: has one Property; has many Parties, Deadlines, Terms, AdditionalProvisions, Signatures, BrokerAcknowledgments, RedactionRegions
relationship_model.Deadline: belongs to ContractDocument; has category, reference section, event, value/status, source page, extracted confidence
relationship_model.Party: belongs to ContractDocument; role buyer/seller; legal name may be redacted; signature records separate from party identity
relationship_model.ParseRun: captures parser version, source checksum, extracted_at, model/tool trace, human_review_status
